name: twg
description: TWG CLI gives Claude Code token-efficient access to Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, JSM, Assets, Atlas, Jira Align, Loom, Trello, Rovo, and connected third-party data sources. Use it to search work, map ownership, summarize status, triage reviews, and run handoffs. Install Atlassian Rovo MCP plugin for your usage outside of your desktop. Learn more: https://teamworkgraph.com/.
